title: Visual Specificity Contract
description: Validates the visual_specificity_contract block used to bind visual work to project-specific domain evidence.

domain_entities.description: Domain nouns users actually work with, grounded in brief quotes and visible mockup anchors.

items.description: A domain entity that must appear in mockups or runtime captures.

brief_quote.description: Verbatim brief quote grounding the entity.

mockup_anchors.description: Mockup file paths or element anchors where the entity is visible.

workflow_signatures.description: Domain-specific actions or decisions the UI must expose as visible affordances.

items.description: A workflow verb and its visible affordance contract.

brief_quote.description: Verbatim brief quote grounding the workflow action.

mockup_affordance.description: Visible control, menu item, shortcut, or interaction where the workflow appears.

data_texture_requirements.description: Expected data shape, sample scale, columns, distributions, and concrete values visible in mockups.

sample_size_target.description: Target sample size represented or implied by the visual artifact.

columns.description: Domain-specific data columns or visible data fields required by the brief.

items.description: A concrete data column or field with expected values.

name.description: Column or field name visible in the mockup.

values.description: Allowed or expected visible values for this field.

distribution.description: Expected value distribution where known; values should sum near 1.0.

additionalProperties.description: Expected proportion for a named value.

values_count.description: Expected count of distinct possible values when listing them is impractical.

named_examples.description: Representative concrete values from the project domain.

brand_or_context_invariants.description: Brand, regulatory, organizational, or contextual constraints that must be visible; may explicitly declare none required with justification.

items.description: A required invariant and where it appears.

description.description: Invariant that must be visible or structurally present.

mockup_location.description: Mockup path or element anchor where the invariant is represented.

none_required.description: Explicit marker that no brand or context invariants apply.

justification.description: Brief-grounded justification for why no invariants are required.

signature_affordances.description: Product-specific differentiating affordances that must be represented.

items.description: A signature affordance and why it is not generic.

what_makes_it_signature.description: Explanation of why this affordance is distinctive for the project.

mockup_anchor.description: Mockup path or element anchor where the affordance is visible.

forbidden_generic_signals.description: Generic phrases, layouts, and patterns that must not appear in mockups or runtime captures.

items.description: A forbidden generic signal and the reason it is harmful.

signal.description: Forbidden phrase, UI label, layout pattern, or visual trope.

reason.description: Reason this signal would make the deliverable generic or misleading.

audience_context.description: Context of use that should shape density, affordances, contrast, platform, and interaction choices.

primary_environment.description: Primary physical or device environment where the artifact is used.

primary_environment_detail.description: Free-text details about the environment of use.

usage_frequency.description: How often the primary user interacts with the artifact.

primary_user_role.description: Primary role or persona using the artifact.

user_experience_level.description: Expected experience level of the primary user.

concurrent_attention.description: Whether the user can dedicate attention or is interrupted while using the artifact.
